FieldDefinition.description: The host name with which ThingWorx platform is exposed to users
FieldDefinition.name: platformProxyHost

FieldDefinition.description: The port of the platform proxy with which ThingWorx platform is exposed to users
FieldDefinition.name: platformProxyPort

FieldDefinition.description: The protocol scheme (http or https) for the host with which ThingWorx platform is exposed to users
FieldDefinition.name: platformProxyScheme

FieldDefinition.description: Specifies the host name of a SOCKS5 proxy server that will be used for connections to the mail server
FieldDefinition.name: socksHost

FieldDefinition.description: Specifies the port number for the SOCKS5 proxy server
FieldDefinition.name: socksPort

FieldDefinition.description: The name of the data shape representing configuration data for the handler
FieldDefinition.name: configuration

FieldDefinition.description: The identifier for the type of supported notification handler
FieldDefinition.name: handlerID

FieldDefinition.description: The localized name for the type of notifications handler
FieldDefinition.name: localizedName

FieldDefinition.description: The name of the service for sending notifications on the handler
FieldDefinition.name: serviceName
